content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Even Array". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1367/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer N, the size of the array. The second line of each test case contains N space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print 'YES' if the array can be made even by changing at most one element, otherwise print 'NO'.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Count the number of odd elements in the array. If there are 0 or 1 odd elements, the array can be made even by changing at most one element.
